revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23991619004|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:櫟谷宗像神社]] { { {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ichitani Munakata Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Ichitani-munakata-jinja1.jpg |location = {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} [[:en:Kyoto City|Kyoto City]] [[Nishikyō Ward]] Arashiyama Nakaoshita-chō 61 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.011394|N|135.676636|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = Ichitani Shrine: {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Okitsuhime|ja|奥津島姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
Munakata Shrine: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} |Sacred Object = |Rank = Ichitani Shrine: {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (Minor Shrine)
Munakata Shrine: {{ill|Kokushi Genzai-sha|ja|国史見在社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokushi Genzai-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 社格|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakaku|qid=Q10444029}}
Both: External subordinate shrine of {{ill|Matsunoo Taisha|en|Matsunoo Taisha|qid=Q710302|lt=Matsuo Taisha|1=Matsunoo Taisha}} |Establishment = Unknown |Main Hall = Two-bay {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alias = |Temple Affiliation = |festival = January 3{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}} |Rituals = |prefecture = {{ill|Nishikyō Ward|qid=Q1154588|1=Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto}} |deity = {{ill|Ichikishimahime|qid=Q11059454|1=Ichikishima-hime}}; {{ill|Takiribime|qid=Q10932870|1=Tagorihime}} }} [[File:Ichitani-munakata-jinja torii.JPG|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Ichitani Munakata Shrine''' (櫟谷宗像神社, also read as Ichidani Munakata Shrine{{Sfn|Matsuo Taisha (Gakuseisha)|2007|p=132-134}}) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Arashiyama Nakaoshita-chō, Nishikyō Ward, [[:en:Kyoto City|Kyoto City]]. The shrine enshrines two deities—Ichitani Shrine and Munakata Shrine—together in one hall. Ichitani Shrine is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and the two shrines collectively serve as subordinate shrines of {{ill|Matsunoo Taisha|en|Matsunoo Taisha|qid=Q710302|lt=Matsuo Taisha|1=Matsunoo Taisha}}. The shrine is located near the southern end of {{ill|Togetsukyō Bridge|ja|渡月橋|it|Ponte Togetsukyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togetsukyō Bridge|1=Togetsu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11561923}} and is considered one of the "Seven Shrines of Matsuo." Ichitani Shrine, along with Matsuo Shrine and {{ill|Tsukiyomi Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|月読神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyomi Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}}, is counted among the "Three Shrines of Matsuo." == Enshrined Deities == The shrine enshrines the following deities{{Sfn|Matsuo Taisha (Gakuseisha)|2007|p=132-134}}: * '''Ichitani Shrine''': {{ill|Tagorihime|lt=Tagorihime|lt=Okitsuhime|ja|奥津島姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Tagorihime) * '''Munakata Shrine''': {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} Historical records such as the ''Matsuo Shafu'' and shrine records list the deities in reverse, suggesting Ichitani Shrine enshrines Ichikishima-hime and Munakata Shrine enshrines Okitsuhime. Some scholars consider this the original configuration{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}}. Another theory in the ''Matsuo Nanasha Ryakki'' identifies the deity of Ichitani Shrine as {{ill|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|ja|事代主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 事代主|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}}. == History == === Establishment === The shrine's founding is unknown, but tradition holds that it was established in the 7th year of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}}’s reign (668 CE) as a branch shrine from the {{ill|Munakata Shrine|ja|宗像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Munakata Shrine|1=Munakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11451842}} in Chikuzen Province[http://www.matsunoo.or.jp/shaden/keigai/pr3-1.shaden.html Matsuo Taisha Official Site: Subordinate and Associated Shrines]. Located where the {{ill|Katsura River|ja|桂川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura River|1=Katsura River (Yodo River system)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2908720}} transitions from the rapids of {{ill|Hozugawa|ja|保津川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozugawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 保津峡|1=Hozu Gorge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10887680}} to a gentler flow, the shrine's position was considered sacred due to its connection to water deities{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}}{{Sfn|Matsuo Taisha (Kami)|1986|p=153-154}}. The name "Ichitani" is believed to refer to a small valley west of the shrine{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}}. === Historical Records === In {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō|1=Kashō}} 1 (848 CE), Ichitani Shrine was granted the Rank of Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, and in {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan|1=Zhenguan}} 10 (868 CE), it was elevated to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Heibonsha)|1979}}. Both shrines appear in records as prominent religious sites near the Katsura Mint{{Sfn|Matsuo Taisha (Kami)|1986|p=153-154}}. During the {{ill|Ninna|ja|仁安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninna|1=Nin'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18925702}} era (1167 CE), historical documents note the death of a nun at the shrine{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Heibonsha)|1979}}. By {{ill|Ninji|en|Ninji|qid=Q1194262|lt=Ninji|1=Ninji}} 2 (1241 CE), both shrines were destroyed by fire, including the sacred objects{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Heibonsha)|1979}}. Despite this, the shrines remained subordinate to Matsuo Taisha{{Sfn|Ichitani Shrine (Heibonsha)|1979}}. In the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|qid=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}}, the shrines were designated as subordinate shrines of Matsuo Taisha in 1878{{Sfn|Matsuo Taisha (Gakuseisha)|2007|p=132-134}}. === Divine Rankings === * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō|1=Kashō}} 1 (848 CE): Promoted to Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (''Zoku Nihon Kōki'')''Zoku Nihon Kōki,'' Kashō 1 (848 CE), 11th Month, 2nd Day. * {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan|1=Zhenguan}} 10 (868 CE): Promoted to Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade (''Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku'')''Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku,'' Jōgan 10 (868 CE), Intercalary 12th Month, 10th Day. == Cultural Artifacts == The shrine preserves two female deity statues and a deity-like figure, designated as Kyoto Prefectural Cultural Properties. These items are displayed in the treasure hall of Matsuo Taisha (refer to {{ill|Matsuo Taisha#Cultural Properties|ja|松尾大社#文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuo Taisha#Cultural Properties|1=Matsunoo Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q710302}}). == In Literature == The shrine is mentioned in the late {{ill|Kamakura period|en|Kamakura period|qid=Q236205|lt=Kamakura period|1=Kamakura period}} anthology ''{{ill|Fuboku Wakashō|ja|夫木和歌抄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuboku Wakashō|1=Fuboku Wakashō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55529342}}'', including a poem by {{ill|Fujiwara no Tameie|en|Fujiwara no Tameie|qid=Q535938|lt=Fujiwara no Tameie|1=Fujiwara no Tameie}}: {{Cquote|Ōikawa shigururu aki no ichihidani yama ya arashi no iro wo kasuramu|20px||Translation: "In Ichitani of Ōigawa, where autumn rains color the stormy mountains."}} == References == {{Reflist}} === Original Sources === {{Reflist|group="orig"}} == Bibliography == * Shrine explanation board * {{Cite book|editor=Shikinaisha Research Society|author=Kazuhiro Kasai|year=1979|title=Research Reports on Shikinaisha, Vol. 1|publisher=Kōgakkan University Press|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|Ichitani Shrine (Shikinaisha)|1979}}}} * {{Cite book|editor=Ken'ichi Tanikawa|author=Yamato Iwao|year=1986|title=The Gods of Japan - Shrines and Sacred Sites, Vol. 5 Yamashiro and Ōmi|publisher=Hakusuisha|isbn=4560022151|ref={{Harvid|Matsuo Taisha (Kami)|1986}}}} * {{Cite book|editor=Matsuo Taisha|year=2007|title=Matsuo Taisha: Subordinate Shrines, Ritual Sites|publisher=Gakuseisha|ref={{Harvid|Matsuo Taisha (Gakuseisha)|2007}}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Matsunoo Taisha|en|Matsunoo Taisha|qid=Q710302|lt=Matsuo Taisha|1=Matsunoo Taisha}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Ichitani-munakata-jinja}} * [http://www.matsunoo.or.jp/index-1/index.html Matsuo Taisha Official Site] ''' [http://www.matsunoo.or.jp/shaden/keigai/pr3-1.shaden.html Subordinate Shrines] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Munakata Faith}} {{translated page|ja|櫟谷宗像神社|version=99210167|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:櫟谷宗像神社]] {{Commons category|Ichitani-munakata-jinja}} {{wikidata link|Q17193235}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nishikyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Nishikyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:Kokushi genzaisha]] [[Category:Matsuo Taisha]] [[Category:Setsumatsusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]]
